leadText: Hone Claws (Japanese: つめとぎ Claw Sharpen) is a non-damaging Dark-type move introduced in Generation V. It was TM01 in Generations V and VI.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Hone Claws raises the user's Attack and accuracy by one stage each. Hone Claws can also be used as part of a Contest Spectacular combination , causing Baton Pass and Stored Power to give the user an extra three appeal points if they are used in the next turn. If powered up by a Darkinium Z into Z-Hone Claws, the user's Attack stat rises by another stage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user sharpens its claws to boost its Attack stat and accuracy.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI It boosts your Attack and accuracy. (The stat changes return to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.) S MD It boosts your Attack and accuracy. The stats return to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Hone Claws is the first Generation V move in index number order.
